trigger: POST /api/users (signup) 또는 PUT /api/user (updateUserDetails) 시 email 입력 검증
condition: email 필드 입력 — null/blank/형식 위반/중복 가능
action: email 검증 + 중복 차단 (App pre-check + DB UQ 2중 안전망)
expected_result: 고유한 email 만 저장 — null/blank 또는 중복 시 거부
rejection_method: throw IllegalArgumentException (Domain — User constructor:52) 또는 DataIntegrityViolationException (DB UQ — race window)
verification_location: Domain (User constructor:52 — null/blank) + Service/Adapter (existsByEmailOrUsername:51 — App pre-check) + DB (schema.sql:26 UNIQUE — race-safe)
error_message: email must not be null or blank / email or username already exists
